paper_plate: Food-soiled paper cannot be recycled. It must go to compost if compostable, or landfill.
plastic_fork: Most plastic utensils are not recyclable and must go to the landfill.
food_scraps: Food waste should always be composted to reduce landfill methane emissions.
coffee_cup: Paper coffee cups are lined with plastic to prevent leaks and must go to the landfill.
coffee_cup_lid: Plastic lids are often recyclable, but check local rules. Generally plastic bin.
napkin_clean: Clean paper products can be recycled in the paper bin.
napkin_greasy: Grease ruins the paper recycling process. Greasy napkins must be composted.
apple_core: Organic matter like fruit cores belongs in the compost bin.
plastic_water_bottle: Empty plastic bottles are highly recyclable. Put them in the plastic bin.
aluminum_can: Aluminum is infinitely recyclable. Make sure it goes in the plastic/metal/glass bin.
paper_straw_wrapper: Paper wrappers can be recycled with mixed paper.
plastic_straw: Plastic straws are too small for recycling sorters and must go to landfill.
coffee_sleeve: Coffee sleeves are made of uncoated cardboard and can be recycled with paper.
cardboard_drink_carrier: Cardboard drink carriers are recyclable with paper products.
glass_juice_bottle: Glass is infinitely recyclable. Put glass bottles in the recycling bin.
half_eaten_muffin: Food waste like half-eaten baked goods should be composted.
banana_peel: Banana peels are organic waste and break down easily in compost.
orange_peel: Citrus peels are compostable organic material.
iced_tea_with_lemon: Separate the lemon wedge from the cup first! The lemon goes in compost, and the paper cup goes in compost too.
lemon_wedge: Lemon wedges and citrus scraps belong in the compost bin.
iced_tea_cup: Paper cups used for cold drinks are compostable.
tea_leaves: Used tea leaves are excellent compost material.
sandwich_crusts: Bread crusts and food scraps should be composted.
plastic_yogurt_container: Rinse and recycle plastic yogurt containers in the plastic bin.
receipt: Most receipts are printed on thermal paper which cannot be recycled. They go to landfill.
sugar_packet: Empty paper sugar packets can be recycled.
stirring_stick: Wooden stir sticks break down naturally in compost.
croissant_crumbs: Baked goods crumbs belong in the compost bin.
egg_shell: Egg shells are rich in calcium and great for compost.
milk_carton: Milk cartons are coated paper but can be recycled in the paper bin in most cities.
aluminum_foil_wrap: Clean aluminum foil goes into the plastic/metal/glass recycling bin.
plastic_cup: Plastic cold drink cups go into the plastic bin.
paper_bag: Paper bags are recyclable with other paper.
used_coffee_filter: Paper coffee filters with coffee grounds are completely compostable.
butter_packet_foil: Small foil-lined butter packets cannot be recycled due to food residue and mixed materials. Landfill.
jam_packet: Small plastic jam packets are not recyclable. Landfill.
broken_ceramic_mug: Ceramics do not melt down like glass. Broken mugs must go to the landfill.
salad_in_plastic_bowl: Dump the salad scraps into compost, then put the plastic bowl in recycling.
salad_scraps: Leftover salad is perfect for compost.
salad_plastic_bowl: Clean plastic bowls can be recycled.
soup_in_paper_cup: Empty the soup liquid into compost, then compost the paper cup.
soup_paper_cup: Food-soiled paper cups go into compost.
sandwich_in_wrapper: Dump the sandwich scraps in compost. The wax wrapper goes to landfill.
wax_wrapper: Wax-coated paper cannot be recycled or composted. It goes to landfill.
muffin_in_paper_liner: Dump the muffin crumbs into compost, and the paper liner goes there too.
yogurt_with_granola: Put the granola in compost, then recycle the yogurt cup and plastic spoon.
yogurt_cup: Plastic yogurt cups can be recycled.
plastic_spoon: Plastic spoons go in the plastic bin.
coffee_with_sleeve_lid: The cardboard sleeve goes in paper, the plastic lid in plastic, and the cup in compost.
smoothie_cup_with_straw: The plastic straw goes to landfill, but the plastic cup can be recycled.
smoothie_straw: Plastic straws are too small to recycle. Landfill.
bagel_in_paper_bag: Dump the bagel scraps into compost, then recycle the paper bag.
bagel_paper_bag: Clean paper bags go in paper recycling.
pasta_in_takeout_box: Dump pasta in compost, then recycle the plastic container and fork.
takeout_fork: Plastic forks go into the plastic bin.
tea_bag_in_cup: The tea bag and paper cup go in compost. The plastic lid goes in recycling.
tea_paper_cup: Paper hot cups go into compost.
tea_plastic_lid: Plastic lids go into the plastic bin.
drywall_scrap: Drywall cannot be composted or recycled easily. Landfill.
wire_clippings: Metal/plastic wire clippings go in the recycling bin.
concrete_chunk: Concrete is not recyclable in normal bins. Landfill.
metal_rebar_piece: Metal rebar is recyclable scrap metal.
sawdust_bag: Clean sawdust is compostable organic material.
used_sandpaper: Sandpaper has mixed materials and cannot be recycled. Landfill.
broken_tile: Ceramic tiles cannot be recycled. Landfill.
copper_pipe_scrap: Copper is valuable recyclable scrap metal.
lumber_offcut: Untreated wood scraps can be composted.
paint_roller: Used paint rollers have mixed contamination. Landfill.
duct_tape_roll: Duct tape is mixed material and not recyclable. Landfill.
glass_window_shard: Construction glass is tempered and cannot go in normal glass recycling. Landfill.
paint_can_with_brush: Remove the brush (landfill), then recycle the empty paint can.
dried_paint_brush: Paint brushes with dried paint cannot be recycled. Landfill.
empty_paint_can: Empty metal paint cans are recyclable.
nails_in_cardboard: Remove the nails (recycle as metal), then recycle the cardboard box.
loose_nails: Metal nails are recyclable scrap metal.
nail_box_cardboard: Cardboard boxes go in paper recycling.
insulation_in_plastic_wrap: Remove the plastic wrap (recycle it), then landfill the insulation.
insulation_piece: Fiberglass insulation is not recyclable. Landfill.
tile_in_paper_packaging: Remove the paper packaging (recycle it), then landfill the tile.
tile_piece: Ceramic tiles are not recyclable. Landfill.
screws_in_plastic_bag: Remove the screws (recycle as metal), then recycle the plastic bag.
metal_screws: Metal screws are recyclable scrap metal.
screw_plastic_bag: Plastic bags go in the plastic bin.
wood_with_nails: Extract the nails (recycle as metal), the wood can be composted.
caulk_tube_with_cap: Remove the plastic cap (recycle it), the tube body goes to landfill.
caulk_tube_body: Caulk tubes have mixed materials. Landfill.
pipe_in_styrofoam: Remove the styrofoam (landfill), then recycle the metal pipe.
metal_pipe: Metal pipes are recyclable scrap metal.
lumber_in_shrink_wrap: Remove the shrink wrap (recycle it), the lumber can be composted.
window_frame_with_glass: Separate the glass (landfill—tempered) from the wood frame (compost).
window_glass: Tempered construction glass cannot be recycled normally. Landfill.
window_frame_wood: Untreated wood frames can be composted.
ketchup_packet: Small foil-lined ketchup packets can't be recycled. Landfill.
mustard_packet: Small condiment packets are landfill due to mixed materials.
relish_cup: Tiny plastic condiment cups are too small to recycle. Landfill.
soda_cup_lid: Plastic lids go in the plastic bin.
corn_cob: Corn cobs are compostable organic material.
wax_paper_wrapper: Wax-coated paper can't be recycled or composted. Landfill.
wooden_skewer: Wooden skewers break down in compost.
plastic_utensil_pack: Plastic utensil packs go in recycling.
churro_paper_sleeve: Paper sleeves soiled with food are compostable.
hot_dog_in_foil: Remove the hot dog scraps (compost), recycle the foil.
nachos_in_tray: Dump nacho scraps in compost, recycle the tray.
soda_cup_with_straw: The straw goes to landfill, the paper cup is compostable.
fries_in_paper_cone: Fry scraps and the greasy cone both go in compost.
pretzel_in_bag: Pretzel leftovers go in compost, plastic bag in recycling.
kebab_on_skewer_in_wrapper: Scraps and skewer go to compost, foil wrapper to recycling.
ice_cream_in_cup: Dump melted ice cream in compost, recycle cup and spoon.
water_bottle_with_label: Peel off the paper label (paper bin), recycle the bottle.
cotton_candy_on_stick: Residue and paper cone go to compost, wooden stick to compost too.
loaded_dog_in_box: Scraps go to compost, cardboard to paper, wax paper to landfill.
champagne_in_plastic: Dump liquid in compost, recycle plastic cup.
empty_pill_bottle: Empty plastic pill bottles are recyclable.
empty_saline_bag: Empty medical saline bags (clean) can be recycled.
pill_bottle_with_cotton: Remove the cotton (landfill) and recycle the bottle.
iv_bag_with_tube: Remove tubing (landfill) and recycle the IV bag.
bandaid_with_wrapper: Paper wrapper goes to paper, band-aid goes to landfill.
thermometer_in_case: Thermometer goes to landfill (e-waste), recycle the plastic case.
